sentences.target: Je jette la bouteille au recyclage.

translations.fr: Je jette la bouteille au recyclage.
translations.en: I’m throwing the bottle in recycling.
translations.es: Tiro la botella al contenedor de reciclaje.
translations.de: Ich werfe die Flasche in den Recyclingbehälter.
translations.it: Butto la bottiglia nel contenitore del riciclo.
translations.ru: Я бросаю бутылку в контейнер для переработки.
translations.pt: Eu jogo a garrafa no recipiente de reciclagem.
translations.vi: Tôi bỏ cái chai vào thùng tái chế.
translations.ar: أرمي الزجاجة في سلة إعادة التدوير.
translations.nl: Ik gooi de fles in de recyclingbak.
translations.uk: Я кидаю пляшку в контейнер для переробки.
translations.hu: Bedobom az üveget a szelektív kukába.
translations.hi: मैं बोतल को रीसाइक्लिंग में डालता हूँ.
translations.pl: Wrzucam butelkę do pojemnika na recykling.
translations.id: Aku membuang botol ke tempat daur ulang.
translations.cs: Házím láhev do kontejneru na recyklaci.
translations.ja: 瓶をリサイクル箱に入れる。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; functions as the subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular of 'jeter'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of the following noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'jette'.
Contraction of preposition 'à' + definite article 'le'; introduces a prepositional phrase indicating destination/purpose.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition (via 'au').

sentences.target: Vous jetez les papiers avant de partir.
sentences.reading: /vu ʒəte le papje avɑ̃ də paʁtiʁ/

translations.fr: Vous jetez les papiers avant de partir.
translations.ipa: /vu ʒəte le papje avɑ̃ də paʁtiʁ/
translations.en: You throw away the papers before leaving.
translations.es: Tiras los papeles antes de irte.
translations.de: Du wirfst die Papiere weg, bevor du gehst.
translations.it: Getti via i fogli prima di andare.
translations.pt: Você joga fora os papéis antes de sair.
translations.he: אתה זורק את הניירות לפני שאתה יוצא.
translations.vi: Bạn vứt giấy trước khi đi.
translations.nl: Je gooit de papieren weg voordat je vertrekt.
translations.uk: Ти викидаєш папери перед тим, як піти.
translations.hi: तुम निकलने से पहले कागज़ फेंकते हो.
translations.nb: Du kaster papirene før du drar.
translations.sv: Du slänger pappren innan du går.
translations.da: Du smider papirerne ud, før du går.
translations.fi: Heität paperit pois ennen kuin lähdet.
translations.ja: 出かける前に紙を捨てる。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun; 2nd person plural (or formal singular); subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person plural of 'jeter'.
Definite article, plural; determiner of the following noun.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'jetez'.
Preposition 'before'; forms the complex preposition 'avant de' introducing a temporal infinitival phrase.
Preposition linking 'avant' to the infinitive 'partir' ('avant de' + infinitive).
Infinitive verb; complement of the complex preposition 'avant de'.

sentences.target: Je dois jeter ce vieux pull.

translations.fr: Je dois jeter ce vieux pull.
translations.en: I have to throw away this old sweater.
translations.es: Tengo que tirar este suéter viejo.
translations.de: Ich muss diesen alten Pulli wegwerfen.
translations.it: Devo buttare via questo vecchio maglione.
translations.ko: 나는 이 오래된 스웨터를 버려야 한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我得把这件旧毛衣扔掉。
translations.ru: Мне нужно выбросить этот старый свитер.
translations.pt: Eu tenho que jogar fora este suéter velho.
translations.he: אני צריך לזרוק את הסוודר הישן הזה.
translations.vi: Tôi phải vứt chiếc áo len cũ này.
translations.ar: عليّ أن أتخلص من هذه الكنزة القديمة.
translations.nl: Ik moet deze oude trui weggooien.
translations.uk: Мені треба викинути цей старий светр.
translations.hu: El kell dobnom ezt a régi pulóvert.
translations.hi: मुझे यह पुराना स्वेटर फेंकना है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να πετάξω αυτό το παλιό πουλόβερ.
translations.nb: Jeg må kaste denne gamle genseren.
translations.id: Aku harus membuang sweter lama ini.
translations.sv: Jag måste slänga den här gamla tröjan.
translations.ro: Trebuie să arunc acest pulover vechi.
translations.da: Jeg skal smide denne gamle sweater ud.
translations.fi: Minun pitää heittää pois tämä vanha villapaita.
translations.ja: この古いセーターを捨てなきゃいけない。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; modal-like verb taking an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb; non-finite complement (xcomp) of 'dois'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; specifies the noun.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular; modifies 'pull'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'jeter'.

sentences.target: Ils jettent la balle au chien.

translations.fr: Ils jettent la balle au chien.
translations.en: They throw the ball to the dog.
translations.es: Le tiran la pelota al perro.
translations.de: Sie werfen dem Hund den Ball zu.
translations.pt: Eles jogam a bola para o cão.
translations.vi: Họ ném quả bóng cho con chó.
translations.nl: Ze gooien de bal naar de hond.
translations.hi: वे कुत्ते को गेंद फेंकते हैं.

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural masculine; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural of 'jeter'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of the following noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'jettent'.
Contraction of preposition 'à' + definite article 'le'; marks an indirect object/recipient.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition (recipient).

Je dois jeter ce vieux pull.
Ils jettent la balle au chien.

They throw the ball to the dog.
